import React from "react"; const HomePage = ({ setCurrentPage }) => { return (
{/* Header */}
PeerCollab
{/* Hero Section */}

Find Your Perfect Academic Partner

Connect with like-minded students, collaborate on projects, and excel in your academic journey through intelligent peer matching.

{/* Features Section */}

Why Choose PeerCollab?

Discover the features that make our platform unique and effective.

{/* Feature Cards */} {[ { icon: "fas fa-user-friends", title: "Smart Matching", desc: "Our AI-powered system connects you with peers who complement your skills and learning style." }, { icon: "fas fa-users", title: "Study Groups", desc: "Form or join study groups based on your courses and academic interests." }, { icon: "fas fa-project-diagram", title: "Project Collaboration", desc: "Find teammates for academic projects and research initiatives." }, { icon: "fas fa-lightbulb", title: "Skill Enhancement", desc: "Learn from peers and share your knowledge in a collaborative environment." } ].map((feature, index) => (

{feature.title}

{feature.desc}

))}
); }; export default HomePage;
